name: Fig Spooks
recipeIngredient: 1 package Cake mix - gold, spice or white
recipeInstructions:
1. Make cake according to package instructions, folding in figs which have been cut into small pieces.
2. Fill cupcake pans 2/3 full.
3. Bake for 25 minutes at 375°F.
4. To make Spooks, turn cupcakes upside down.
5. Place a dab of icing in the center.
6. Set whole California dried fig upright with the stem standing erect at the top.
7. Let stand until firm.
8. Ice the whole thin with soft white butter icing.
9. Let icing flow around the base of the cake to resemble a sheet.
10. Mark off slits for eyes.
Source: 48 Family Favorites with California Figs
Reprinted with the permission of The California Fig Advisory Board
Electronic format courtesy of Karen Mintzias
